en: When Jesus had finished all these sayings, he said to his disciples,
zh: 耶穌說完了這一切話，就對門徒說：

en: "You know that after two days the Passover is coming, and the Son of Man will be delivered up to be crucified."
zh: “你們知道兩天之後就是逾越節，人子將要被交給人，釘在十字架上。”

en: Then the chief priests and the elders of the people gathered in the palace of the high priest, whose name was Caiaphas,
zh: 那時，祭司長和民間的長老聚集在大祭司該亞法的官邸，

en: and plotted together in order to arrest Jesus by stealth and kill him.
zh: 商議怎樣用詭計逮捕耶穌，把他殺害。

en: But they said, "Not during the feast, lest there be an uproar among the people."
zh: 不過他們說：“不可在節期下手，免得引起民眾暴動。”

en: Now when Jesus was at Bethany in the house of Simon the leper,
zh: 耶穌在伯大尼，在患痲風的西門家裡的時候，

en: a woman came up to him with an alabaster flask of very expensive ointment, and she poured it on his head as he reclined at table.
zh: 有一個女人拿著一瓶珍貴的香膏前來，當耶穌坐席的時候，把它澆在耶穌的頭上。

en: And when the disciples saw it, they were indignant, saying, "Why this waste?
zh: 門徒看見了，就很生氣，說：“為甚麼這樣浪費呢？

en: For this could have been sold for a large sum and given to the poor."
zh: 這香膏可以賣很多錢，賙濟窮人。”

en: But Jesus, aware of this, said to them, "Why do you trouble the woman? For she has done a beautiful thing to me.
zh: 耶穌知道了，就說：“為甚麼難為這個女人呢？她為我作了一件美事。

en: For you always have the poor with you, but you will not always have me.
zh: 你們常常有窮人跟你們在一起，然而卻不常有我。

en: In pouring this ointment on my body, she has done it to prepare me for burial.
zh: 她把這香膏澆在我身上，是為了安葬我而作的。

en: Truly, I say to you, wherever this gospel is proclaimed in the whole world, what she has done will also be told in memory of her."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，這福音無論傳到世界上甚麼地方，這女人所作的都要傳講，來記念她。”

en: Then one of the twelve, whose name was Judas Iscariot, went to the chief priests
zh: 那時，十二門徒中的一個，就是加略人猶大，去見祭司長，說：

en: and said, "What will you give me if I deliver him over to you?" And they paid him thirty pieces of silver.
zh: “如果我把他交給你們，你們願意給我甚麼呢？”他們就給了他三十塊銀子。

en: And from that moment he sought an opportunity to betray him.
zh: 從那時起，他就找機會把耶穌交給他們。

en: Now on the first day of Unleavened Bread the disciples came to Jesus, saying, "Where will you have us prepare for you to eat the Passover?"
zh: 除酵節的第一天，門徒前來問耶穌：“你要我們在哪裡為你預備逾越節的晚餐呢？”

en: He said, "Go into the city to a certain man and say to him, 'The Teacher says, My time is at hand. I will keep the Passover at your house with my disciples.'"
zh: 他說：“你們到城裡去見某人，對他說，老師說：‘我的時候快到了；我要到你那裡和我的門徒守逾越節。’”

en: And the disciples did as Jesus had directed them, and they prepared the Passover.
zh: 門徒照耶穌的指示去作，預備好了逾越節的晚餐。

en: When it was evening, he reclined at table with the twelve.
zh: 到了晚上，耶穌和十二門徒一同吃晚餐。

en: And as they were eating, he said, "Truly, I say to you, one of you will betray me."
zh: 他們吃的時候，耶穌說：“我實在告訴你們，你們中間有一個人要出賣我。”

en: And they were very sorrowful and began to say to him one after another, "Is it I, Lord?"
zh: 他們就很憂愁，一個一個地問他：“主啊，是我嗎？”

en: He answered, "He who has dipped his hand in the dish with me will betray me.
zh: 他回答：“那和我一同把手蘸在盤子裡的人，他要出賣我。

en: The Son of Man goes as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would have been better for that man if he had not been born."
zh: 正如經上指著人子所說的，他固然要離世，但出賣人子的那人有禍了！他沒有生下來倒好。”

en: Judas, who would betray him, answered, "Is it I, Rabbi?" He said to him, "You have said so."
zh: 那出賣耶穌的猶大說：“拉比，是我嗎？”他說：“這是你說的。”

en: Now as they were eating, Jesus took bread, and after blessing it broke it and gave it to the disciples, and said, "Take, eat; this is my body."
zh: 他們吃的時候，耶穌拿起餅來，祝謝了就擘開，遞給門徒，說：“你們拿去吃吧，這是我的身體。”

en: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he gave it to them, saying, "Drink of it, all of you,
zh: 耶穌又拿起杯來，祝謝了就遞給他們，說：“你們都喝吧，

en: for this is my blood of the covenant, which is poured out for many for the forgiveness of sins.
zh: 這是我的血，是為立約的，為許多人流出來，使罪得赦。

en: I tell you I will not drink again of this fruit of the vine until that day when I drink it new with you in my Father's kingdom."
zh: 我告訴你們，從今以後我必不再喝這葡萄酒，直到我和你們在我父的國裡喝新酒的那一天。”

en: And when they had sung a hymn, they went out to the Mount of Olives.
zh: 他們唱完了詩，就出來往橄欖山去。

en: Then Jesus said to them, "You will all fall away because of me this night. For it is written, 'I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock will be scattered.'
zh: 那時，耶穌對他們說：“今天晚上，你們因我的緣故都要後退，因為經上記著： ‘我要擊打牧人， 羊群就分散了。’

en: But after I am raised up, I will go before you to Galilee."
zh: 我復活以後，要比你們先到加利利去。”

en: Peter answered him, "Though they all fall away because of you, I will never fall away."
zh: 彼得對他說：“就算所有的人都因你的緣故後退，我卻永不後退。”

en: Jesus said to him, "Truly, I tell you, this very night, before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“我實在告訴你，今天晚上雞叫以前，你會三次不認我。”

en: Peter said to him, "Even if I must die with you, I will not deny you!" And all the disciples said the same.
zh: 彼得對他說：“就算必須與你一同死，我也決不會不認你。”門徒也都這樣說。

en: Then Jesus went with them to a place called Gethsemane, and he said to his disciples, "Sit here, while I go over there and pray."
zh: 耶穌和門徒來到一個地方，名叫客西馬尼，就對門徒說：“你們坐在這裡，我要到那邊去禱告。”

en: And taking with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, he began to be sorrowful and troubled.
zh: 他帶了彼得和西庇太的兩個兒子一起去，心裡憂愁難過，

en: Then he said to them, "My soul is very sorrowful, even to death; remain here, and watch with me."
zh: 對他們說：“我的心靈痛苦得快要死了；你們留在這裡，與我一同警醒吧。”

en: And going a little farther he fell on his face and prayed, saying, "My Father, if it be possible, let this cup pass from me; nevertheless, not as I will, but as you will."
zh: 他稍往前走，把臉俯伏在地上，禱告說：“我的父啊！可能的話，求你使這杯離開我；但不要照我的意思，只要照你的旨意。”

en: And he came to the disciples and found them sleeping. And he said to Peter, "So, could you not watch with me one hour?
zh: 耶穌回到門徒那裡，看見他們都睡著了，就對彼得說：“你們連一個小時也不能同我警醒嗎？

en: Watch and pray that you may not enter into temptation. The spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak."
zh: 應當警醒、禱告，免得陷入試探；你們心靈雖然願意，肉體卻是軟弱的。”

en: Again, for the second time, he went away and prayed, "My Father, if this cannot pass unless I drink it, your will be done."
zh: 他又再次走開，禱告說：“我的父啊！如果這杯不能離開我，一定要我喝，就願你的旨意成全。”

en: And again he came and found them sleeping, for their eyes were heavy.
zh: 他再回來的時候，看見門徒睡著了，因為他們十分疲倦。

en: So, leaving them again, he went away and prayed for the third time, saying the same words again.
zh: 他又離開他們，第三次去禱告，說的也是同樣的話。

en: Then he came to the disciples and said to them, "Sleep and take your rest later on. See, the hour is at hand, and the Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
zh: 然後，他回到門徒那裡，對他們說：“你們還在睡覺休息嗎？看哪，時候到了，人子要被交在罪人的手裡了。

en: Rise, let us be going; see, my betrayer is at hand."
zh: 起來，我們走吧！出賣我的人來了。”

en: While he was still speaking, Judas came, one of the twelve, and with him a great crowd with swords and clubs, from the chief priests and the elders of the people.
zh: 耶穌還在說話的時候，十二門徒中的猶大，帶著一大群拿著刀棒的人來到，他們是祭司長和民間的長老派來的。

en: Now the betrayer had given them a sign, saying, "The one I will kiss is the man; seize him."
zh: 出賣耶穌的人給他們一個暗號，說：“我跟誰親吻，誰就是他；你們可以抓住他。”

en: And he came up to Jesus at once and said, "Greetings, Rabbi!" And he kissed him.
zh: 他立刻前來對耶穌說：“拉比，你好。”跟著就與他親吻。

en: Jesus said to him, "Friend, do what you came to do." Then they came up and laid hands on Jesus and seized him.
zh: 耶穌對他說：“朋友，你來要作的事，快作吧！”於是那些人上前來，動手拿住耶穌，逮捕了他。

en: And behold, one of those who were with Jesus stretched out his hand and drew his sword and struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
zh: 有一個與耶穌在一起的人，伸手拔出刀來，砍了大祭司的僕人一刀，削掉他的一隻耳朵。

en: Then Jesus said to him, "Put your sword back into its place. For all who take the sword will perish by the sword.
zh: 耶穌對他說：“把你的刀收回原處！凡動刀的必死在刀下。

en: Do you think that I cannot appeal to my Father, and he will at once send me more than twelve legions of angels?
zh: 你以為我不能求我的父，他就馬上給我派十二營以上的天使下來嗎？

en: But how then should the Scriptures be fulfilled, that it must be so?"
zh: 如果這樣，經上預言這事必須發生，怎能應驗呢？”

en: At that hour Jesus said to the crowds, "Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs to capture me? Day after day I sat in the temple teaching, and you did not seize me.
zh: 那時，耶穌對眾人說：“你們帶著刀棒出來，把我當作強盜捉拿嗎？我天天坐在殿裡教導人，你們卻沒有逮捕我。

en: But all this has taken place that the Scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled." Then all the disciples left him and fled.
zh: 但這整件事的發生，是要應驗先知書上的話。”那時，門徒都離開他逃跑了。

en: Then those who had seized Jesus led him to Caiaphas the high priest, where the scribes and the elders had gathered.
zh: 那些逮捕了耶穌的人，把他押去見大祭司該亞法。那時經學家和長老已經聚集在那裡了。

en: And Peter was following him at a distance, as far as the courtyard of the high priest, and going inside he sat with the guards to see the end.
zh: 彼得遠遠地跟著耶穌，直到大祭司的官邸。他進到裡面，和差役坐在一起，要看事情怎樣了結。

en: Now the chief priests and the whole Council were seeking false testimony against Jesus that they might put him to death,
zh: 祭司長和公議會全體都想找假證供來控告耶穌，好把他處死；

en: but they found none, though many false witnesses came forward. At last two came forward
zh: 雖然有許多人前來作假證供，卻找不著證據。最後有兩個人前來說：

en: and said, "This man said, 'I am able to destroy the temple of God, and to rebuild it in three days.'"
zh: “這人說過：‘我可以拆毀 神的聖所，三日之內又把它建造起來。’”

en: And the high priest stood up and said, "Have you no answer to make? What is it that these men testify against you?"
zh: 大祭司就站起來，對耶穌說：“你為甚麼不回答？這些人作證，控告你的是甚麼呢？”

en: But Jesus remained silent. And the high priest said to him, "I adjure you by the living God, tell us if you are the Christ, the Son of God."
zh: 耶穌卻不作聲。大祭司又對他說：“我指著永生的 神要你起誓，告訴我們你是不是基督、 神的兒子。”

en: Jesus said to him, "You have said so. But I tell you, from now on you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power and coming on the clouds of heaven."
zh: 耶穌回答：“你已經說了 ；但我告訴你們： 從今以後，你們要看見人子， 坐在權能者的右邊， 駕著天上的雲降臨。”

en: Then the high priest tore his robes and said, "He has uttered blasphemy. What further witnesses do we need? You have now heard his blasphemy.
zh: 大祭司就撕開衣服，說：“他說了褻瀆的話，我們還要甚麼證人呢？你們現在聽見了這褻瀆的話，

en: What is your judgment?" They answered, "He deserves death."
zh: 認為怎樣呢？”他們回答：“他是該死的。”

en: Then they spit in his face and struck him. And some slapped him,
zh: 於是他們吐唾沫在他的臉上，用拳頭打他，也有人用掌摑他，說：

en: saying, "Prophesy to us, you Christ! Who is it that struck you?"
zh: “基督啊，向我們說預言吧！是誰打你呢？”

en: Now Peter was sitting outside in the courtyard. And a servant girl came up to him and said, "You also were with Jesus the Galilean."
zh: 彼得坐在外面的院子裡，有一個婢女走過來對他說：“你也是和加利利人耶穌一夥的。”

en: But he denied it before them all, saying, "I do not know what you mean."
zh: 彼得卻當眾否認，說：“我不知道你說甚麼。”

en: And when he went out to the entrance, another servant girl saw him, and she said to the bystanders, "This man was with Jesus of Nazareth."
zh: 他出到門口，又有一個婢女看見他，就對那裡的人說：“這人是和拿撒勒人耶穌一夥的。”

en: And again he denied it with an oath: "I do not know the man."
zh: 彼得再次否認，並且發誓說：“我不認識那個人。”

en: After a little while the bystanders came up and said to Peter, "Certainly you too are one of them, for your accent betrays you."
zh: 過了一會，站在那裡的人前來對他說：“你的確是他們中間的一個，因為一聽你的口音就認出來了。”

en: Then he began to invoke a curse on himself and to swear, "I do not know the man." And immediately the rooster crowed.
zh: 彼得就發咒起誓說：“我不認識那一個人。”立刻雞就叫了。

en: And Peter remembered the saying of Jesus, "Before the rooster crows, you will deny me three times." And he went out and wept bitterly.
zh: 彼得想起耶穌所說的話：“雞叫以前，你會三次不認我”，他就出去痛哭。
